task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Rocket.Chat workspace interface is visible in the web browser, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'release-updates' channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main chat window header displays 'release-updates' as the active channel.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct file for upload.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file upload preview modal or dialog is visible in Rocket.Chat showing the file 'release_summary.csv' staged for upload.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the required text phrase to accompany the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Release summary for team review - contains recent RC release dates and versions' is visible in the message input box or file description field before sending.

task_completion.description: Verify the file and message were successfully posted to the channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chat history for 'release-updates' shows a sent message containing both the 'release_summary.csv' file attachment and the exact text 'Release summary for team review - contains recent RC release dates and versions'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser (e.g., Chrome/Firefox) open to localhost:3000 with mouse/cursor interactions, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually uploaded a file rather than just typing a message.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final message in the chat should display a file attachment UI element (like a downloadable file box or CSV icon) alongside the text, not just plain text mimicking an attachment.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction occurred within the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the standard Rocket.Chat UI, not a text editor, notes app, or mocked HTML page.
